title: RocksDB Key-Value Entry
description: Schema representing a key-value entry in a RocksDB database, including optional column family and metadata.

key.description: The key as a string or base64-encoded byte string for binary keys.

value.description: The value associated with the key. Can be a string, object, or base64 bytes.

column_family.description: Name of the column family containing this entry. Defaults to 'default'.

sequence_number.description: Internal RocksDB sequence number at which this entry was written.

type.description: Type of the RocksDB write operation.

timestamp.description: Timestamp of the write operation (when user-defined timestamps are enabled).

ttl_seconds.description: Time-to-live in seconds from the creation time. Key expires after this duration.
